blocks.text: Yesterday we did not leave Leonidio - or Kai. We stayed out too late drinking, woke up at 12, and then made the incredibly difficult decision to sleep in the beach chairs rather than bike into the mountains to cross over to the next peninsula of the Peloponnese.
We once again laid in the beach chairs and slept and read.
Most of the day was spent like that - relaxing. Then in the evening we walked down the beach back to the restaurant we had drinks at and had the actual last supper together
The food was great. We bought Musaka, some veal and potatoes, beer and meatballs - and of course Greek salad.
The restaurant food almost tastes as good as our own cooking 🧑🍳
Nothing else happened yesterday and we all just went to bed really early.

Oh yea one more thing. This retired German Interpol agent gave us a paper map - Adam and I used it to plan out our course to Albania. I think it's my first time actually using a paper map to plan a route. Epic.
